title: BEM-866 restore codex queue step
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: |\n          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything\n'
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_STEP_RESTORED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 codex queue step restored\nStatus: RESTORED\nStep: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('restored codex queue processor step')
"""
